name: YouTube Transcript
author: itz-mune
description: Retrieve the auto-generated or manual transcript from any YouTube video.
long_description: Adds a `get_youtube_transcript` tool that fetches the transcript (captions) for a YouTube video by URL or video ID. Useful for summarizing or Q&A over video content.

config_fields.label: Language code
config_fields.help: Preferred transcript language code (e.g. 'en', 'es', 'fr'). Falls back to any available language.
